title: Griffitharia karchungii
taxonomy: Griffitharia karchungii is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Griffitharia and is native to the Himalayas. Griffitharia karchungii is classified as an epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants such as trees for support. Further classification places Griffitharia karchungii in the order Asparagales and the family Orchidaceae. Griffitharia karchungii's taxonomic classification is further detailed within the subfamily Orchidoideae.
